items.description: Multi vehicle crash on US 22 westbound between Exit: EAST I-376/US 22/30 TO I-79 and Exit: MONTOUR CHURCH ROAD/OLD STEUBENVILLE PIKE. All lanes closed.
items.formatted: US-22 (Allegheny County) | Multi-vehicle crash on US 22 westbound between Exit: EAST I-376/US 22/30 TO I-79 and Exit: MONTOUR CHURCH ROAD/OLD STEUBENVILLE PIKE. All lanes Closed. Estimated Reopen: 5/13/26 - 21:00
